description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 111.

Soul Strike

Strike, Ichimonji

Weapon: Any melee weapon or unarmed strike Classes: Fighter, Monk, Ranger, Rogue Channeling Time: 1 action Base LP Cost: 2 Range: Weapon range Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute

You channel your soul into your weapon and release it as a burst of white flame shaped like the strike itself. Make a weapon attack against a target within range. On a hit, you deal Soul damage with your weapon attack, and the creature falls unconscious as its soul is expelled from its body and cast into the ethereal plane. While the soul is expelled, the body remains unconscious and cannot be awakened. A creature that has Legendary Points can expend 2 Legendary Points to resist this effect.

An expelled soul appears in a space within 5 feet of its body on the ethereal plane. It retains the same statistics as its body and can act on each of its turns, but remains in the ethereal plane and can only affect creatures and objects there. At the start of each of its turns, the soul can attempt to return to its body by succeeding on a Charisma saving throw. On a success, the soul returns and the creature regains consciousness. Damage dealt to the soul is also dealt to the body, but damage dealt to the body does not affect the soul. When body and soul are reunited, the creature’s hit points become the lower of the two counts. If the body is killed before the soul returns, the soul is lost in the ethereal and cannot return unless the body is resurrected. If neither the body nor the soul has been destroyed after 1 minute, the soul snaps back to the body.

Creatures with no soul–such as certain Constructs and Undead–are unaffected by this technique. This technique can hit a creature in the ethereal plane.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2

ariadne.weapon: Any melee weapon or unarmed strike
